## Running

### Mode 1 — Simulator (no hardware, CI default)

```bash
cd generated/tests
pytest . -v
```

### Mode 2 — vcan0 (Linux virtual CAN)

```bash
sudo modprobe vcan && sudo ip link add dev vcan0 type vcan && sudo ip link set up vcan0
CAN_INTERFACE=socketcan CAN_CHANNEL=vcan0 pytest . -v
```

### Mode 3 — Physical hardware
```bash
CAN_INTERFACE=pcan CAN_CHANNEL=PCAN_USBBUS1 pytest . -v --hil
```
